title: 日本ダービーの後に・下は見ない！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio does amazing in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she's saddened at not being able to do
the peace sign to symbolize the Double Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her journey isn't over yet, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets her sights on winning the last Classic
race, the Kikuka Sho. Her fighting spirit still rages
on!
